sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48680" key="qhlu/tropos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θηλύ-τροπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48680.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of womanish habit</tr_>: metaph., of the planet Venus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.136</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
